nodes.name: PostHogProvider.tsx
nodes.summary: React context provider that lazily initializes PostHog analytics on mount and exposes an initialization-complete flag to children.

nodes.name: PostHogProvider
nodes.summary: Initializes PostHog once on mount, tracks the init event, and renders children once ready.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting project-related React Query hooks and types used across the desktop renderer.

nodes.name: useFinalizeProjectSetup.ts
nodes.summary: Hook that finalizes a newly created project by ensuring its workspace and project entries exist in the sidebar and invalidating the host project list cache.

nodes.name: useFinalizeProjectSetup
nodes.summary: Returns a callback that ensures a workspace/project pair is present in the sidebar and invalidates the host project list query.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel re-exporting the host project ID query key builder and hook.

nodes.name: useHostProjectIds.ts
nodes.summary: React Query hook that fetches the list of project IDs known to a given host service, with query key builder helper.

nodes.name: hostProjectListQueryKey
nodes.summary: Builds the React Query cache key for a host's project list, scoped by host URL.

nodes.name: useHostProjectIds
nodes.summary: Fetches project IDs for a host via the host service client and returns them, warning on failure.

nodes.name: useUpdateWorkspace.ts
nodes.summary: Mutation hook that updates a workspace via the Electron tRPC bridge and invalidates cached workspace queries on success.

nodes.name: useUpdateWorkspace
nodes.summary: Mutation hook that calls the workspaces.update tRPC procedure and invalidates workspace caches on success.

nodes.name: VersionHistorySheet.tsx
nodes.summary: Slide-over panel that lists an automation's prompt version history, previews a selected version's content, and lets the user restore it.

nodes.name: VersionHistorySheet
nodes.summary: Renders the version-history list and content preview for an automation, and handles restoring a selected version via mutation.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export for the VersionRow list-item component used inside VersionHistorySheet.

nodes.name: AgentCell.tsx
nodes.summary: Table cell that resolves and renders the agent preset icon and label assigned to an automation row.

nodes.name: AgentCell
nodes.summary: Looks up the agent choice by ID and renders its preset icon and label, or a fallback if not found.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export for the AgentCell component.

nodes.name: AgentPicker.tsx
nodes.summary: Dropdown picker for selecting an AI agent preset for an automation, with an option to navigate to agent configuration.

nodes.name: AgentPicker
nodes.summary: Renders a dropdown of available agent presets for a host, with an entry to navigate to agent settings.

nodes.name: AutomationRow.tsx
nodes.summary: Table row rendering a single automation's metadata, last-run status, and quick actions (run, view history, delete) with navigation to its detail page.

nodes.name: AutomationRow
nodes.summary: Renders an automation's row with owner, project, schedule, last-run status, and an actions dropdown, navigating to detail/history on click.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export for the automation row's actions dropdown menu items.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export for a generic table cell component that pairs an icon with a label.

nodes.name: ProjectPicker.tsx
nodes.summary: Dropdown picker for choosing the project a new automation should target, listing recently used projects.

nodes.name: ProjectPicker
nodes.summary: Renders a dropdown for choosing among recent projects to attach to a new automation.

nodes.name: SchedulePicker.tsx
nodes.summary: Form control for configuring an automation's recurrence schedule, translating between RRULE strings and a friendly preset/day/time UI state.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements bidirectional RRULE <-> UI-state conversion (stateFromRrule / rruleFromState) to keep the calendar recurrence spec in sync with form controls.

nodes.name: stateFromRrule
nodes.summary: Parses an RRULE string into the picker's internal preset/day/time state, matching against known presets.

nodes.name: rruleFromState
nodes.summary: Serializes the picker's preset/day/time state back into an RRULE string.

nodes.name: SchedulePicker
nodes.summary: Renders preset, weekday, and time controls for editing an automation's recurrence rule, keeping RRULE and UI state in sync.

nodes.name: TimezonePicker.tsx
nodes.summary: Dropdown picker listing available IANA timezones (via Intl.supportedValuesOf) for configuring an automation's schedule.

nodes.name: TimezonePicker
nodes.summary: Renders a searchable dropdown of IANA timezone names for selecting an automation's timezone.

nodes.name: WorkspacePicker.tsx
nodes.summary: Dropdown picker for selecting the workspace an automation should run against, sorted by recency and filtered by host/project.

nodes.name: WorkspacePicker
nodes.summary: Renders a dropdown of workspaces for a host/project, sorted by recency, for selecting an automation's target workspace.

nodes.name: useProjectFileSearch.ts
nodes.summary: Hook exposing a callback that searches project files on a host service, used to power file-mention autocomplete in automation prompts.

nodes.name: useProjectFileSearch
nodes.summary: Returns a callback that queries the host service's filesystem search API and maps results for file-mention autocomplete.

nodes.name: useRecentProjects.ts
nodes.summary: Hook combining live-queried local projects and GitHub repositories into a merged, deduplicated list of recent projects for pickers.

nodes.name: useRecentProjects
nodes.summary: Merges locally-known projects and GitHub repositories via live queries into a single recent-projects list.

nodes.name: useRelayHostTarget.ts
nodes.summary: Hook that resolves an alternate relay host target for a workspace when the primary host is unavailable.

nodes.name: useRelayHostTarget
nodes.summary: Finds an alternate host from the workspace's available hosts to use as a relay target.

nodes.name: NewProjectModal.tsx
nodes.summary: Modal dialog for creating a new local or cloud project, prompting for a Git URL or folder and finalizing project/workspace setup afterward.

nodes.name: NewProjectModal
nodes.summary: Manages the new-project creation flow (folder select or Git clone), invoking host service APIs and finalizing project setup on success.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export for the useFolderFirstImport hook and its result type.

nodes.name: useFolderFirstImport.ts
nodes.summary: Hook orchestrating the folder-first project import flow: selecting a local directory, initializing git if needed, and creating the project via the host service.

nodes.name: useFolderFirstImport
nodes.summary: Runs the folder-first import flow: prompts for a directory, optionally initializes git, and creates the project through the host service.

nodes.name: useDestroyDialogState.ts
nodes.summary: Hook managing the confirmation-dialog state and destructive action for deleting a workspace, including navigating away and updating sidebar/user preferences.

nodes.name: useDestroyDialogState
nodes.summary: Manages confirmation state and executes workspace destruction, navigating away and syncing sidebar/user-preference state afterward.

nodes.name: SubmitPromptDialog.tsx
nodes.summary: Dialog allowing a user to submit a prompt idea/feedback via the API tRPC client from the sidebar help menu.

nodes.name: SubmitPromptDialog
nodes.summary: Renders a dialog form for submitting a prompt idea to the API via tRPC.

nodes.name: useDashboardSidebarPortsData.ts
nodes.summary: Hook that aggregates and groups forwarded port data across visible workspaces for display in the dashboard sidebar's ports list.

nodes.name: useDashboardSidebarPortsData
nodes.summary: Collects forwarded-port data for all visible workspaces from the host service and groups it for the sidebar ports list.

nodes.name: useDashboardSidebarProjectSectionActions.ts
nodes.summary: Hook providing action handlers (rename, collapse, new workspace) for a project section in the dashboard sidebar.

nodes.name: useDashboardSidebarProjectSectionActions
nodes.summary: Provides rename, collapse, and new-workspace action handlers for a sidebar project section.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export for the sidebar section's context-menu dropdown and actions components.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export for the sidebar section header component.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export for the sidebar section rename context provider and hook, used to coordinate inline-rename UI state across sidebar sections.

nodes.name: useDashboardSidebarWorkspaceItemActions.ts
nodes.summary: Hook providing the full set of action handlers (rename, remove, copy link, notifications) for a workspace item in the dashboard sidebar.

nodes.name: useDashboardSidebarWorkspaceItemActions
nodes.summary: Provides rename, remove, copy-link, and notification-related action handlers for a sidebar workspace item.

nodes.name: SortableSectionHeader.tsx
nodes.summary: Draggable sidebar section header supporting reorder, collapse, rename, and delete actions via a drag handle and context menu.

nodes.name: SortableSectionHeader
nodes.summary: Renders a draggable sidebar section header with collapse toggle, rename, and delete via a context menu.

nodes.name: V2SetupScriptCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Sidebar card prompting the user to run a V2 project setup script, tracking dismissal state and draft workspace creation.

nodes.name: V2SetupScriptCard
nodes.summary: Renders a dismissible card prompting the user to run the V2 setup script for a project, tracking dismissal per project.

nodes.name: buildDashboardSidebarProjects.ts
nodes.summary: Pure function that assembles the dashboard sidebar's project tree from raw project, section, workspace, and pull-request data.

nodes.name: buildDashboardSidebarProjects
nodes.summary: Combines projects, sections, workspaces, and pull-request data into the nested project/workspace tree structure the sidebar renders.
